services.development.hero.title: Software Development
services.development.hero.subtitle: Custom solutions engineered for performance, scalability, and long-term value
services.development.problem.title: The Challenge
services.development.problem.description: Off-the-shelf software rarely fits unique business requirements. Companies struggle with rigid systems that can't scale, poor integration between tools, and mounting technical debt that slows innovation.
services.development.approach.title: Our Approach
services.development.approach.descriptio: We build custom applications tailored to your exact needs, using modern architectures that scale with your growth.
services.development.step1.title: Discovery
services.development.step1.description: Deep dive into your business processes, user needs, and technical landscape
services.development.step2.title: Architecture
services.development.step2.description: Design scalable, maintainable system architecture with the right technology stack
services.development.step3.title: Development
services.development.step3.description: Agile sprints with continuous delivery and transparent progress tracking
services.development.step4.title: Launch & Support
services.development.step4.description: Smooth deployment, monitoring, and ongoing maintenance to keep systems running
services.development.deliverables.title: What You Get
services.automation.hero.title: Automation
services.automation.hero.subtitle: Eliminate repetitive work and unlock operational efficiency through intelligent automation
services.automation.problem.title: The Challenge
services.automation.problem.description: Manual processes drain resources, introduce human error, and prevent teams from focusing on high-value work. As businesses grow, these inefficiencies compound exponentially.
services.automation.approach.title: Our Approach
services.automation.approach.description: We identify automation opportunities across your operations and implement solutions that deliver measurable ROI.
services.automation.step1.title: Audit
services.automation.step1.description: Map current workflows and identify high-impact automation opportunities
services.automation.step2.title: Design
services.automation.step2.description: Create automation blueprints with clear success metrics and rollback plans
services.automation.step3.title: Implement
services.automation.step3.description: Build and test automation workflows with parallel manual fallback
services.automation.step4.title: Optimize
services.automation.step4.description: Monitor performance, refine triggers, and expand automation coverage
services.automation.deliverables.title: What You Get
services.qa.hero.title: Quality Assurance
services.qa.hero.subtitle: Deliver flawless software with comprehensive testing strategies that catch issues before your users do
services.qa.problem.title: The Challenge
services.qa.problem.description: Bugs in production damage trust and revenue. Without systematic testing, teams ship features hoping for the best while technical debt and regression issues accumulate silently.
services.qa.approach.title: Our Approach
services.qa.approach.description: We embed quality throughout your development lifecycle with a mix of automated and manual testing tailored to your release cadence.
services.qa.step1.title: Assessment
services.qa.step1.description: Evaluate current testing maturity and identify critical coverage gaps
services.qa.step2.title: Strategy
services.qa.step2.description: Design a testing pyramid: unit, integration, E2E, and exploratory testing
services.qa.step3.title: Execution
services.qa.step3.description: Build test suites, automate regression tests, and integrate into CI/CD
services.qa.step4.title: Continuous QA
services.qa.step4.description: Ongoing test maintenance, performance monitoring, and quality reporting
services.qa.deliverables.title: What You Get
services.cybersecurity.hero.title: Cybersecurity
services.cybersecurity.hero.subtitle: Protect your organization with enterprise-grade security that stays ahead of evolving threats
services.cybersecurity.problem.title: The Challenge
services.cybersecurity.problem.descripti: Cyber threats grow more sophisticated daily. Without a proactive security posture, organizations face data breaches, compliance failures, and reputational damage that can take years to recover from.
services.cybersecurity.approach.title: Our Approach
services.cybersecurity.approach.descript: We take a defense-in-depth approach, layering security controls across your infrastructure, applications, and processes.
services.cybersecurity.step1.title: Assessment
services.cybersecurity.step1.description: Comprehensive security audit of infrastructure, applications, and policies
services.cybersecurity.step2.title: Hardening
services.cybersecurity.step2.description: Implement security controls, patch vulnerabilities, and configure defenses
services.cybersecurity.step3.title: Monitoring
services.cybersecurity.step3.description: Deploy threat detection, SIEM integration, and incident response procedures
services.cybersecurity.step4.title: Resilience
services.cybersecurity.step4.description: Regular penetration testing, security training, and disaster recovery planning

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Find answers to common questions about our services and process
faq.0.question: What services does Quartz offer?
faq.0.answer: We provide four core services: custom software development, business process automation, quality assurance and testing, and cybersecurity solutions. Each service can be engaged independently or as part of an integrated digital transformation strategy.
faq.1.question: How long does a typical project take?
faq.1.answer: Project timelines vary based on scope and complexity. A focused automation project might take 4-6 weeks, while a full custom application can range from 3-6 months. We provide detailed timelines during the discovery phase.
faq.2.question: Do you work with clients outside Saudi Arabia?
faq.2.answer: Yes, we serve clients globally. While our offices are in Riyadh, we have extensive experience working with remote teams across the Middle East, Europe, and North America.
faq.3.question: What is your development methodology?
faq.3.answer: We follow Agile methodology with two-week sprints, daily standups, and regular client demos. This ensures transparency, early feedback, and the flexibility to adapt to evolving requirements.
faq.4.question: How do you handle data security and confidentiality?
faq.4.answer: Security is built into everything we do. We sign NDAs before project kickoff, follow secure development practices (OWASP), encrypt all data in transit and at rest, and can comply with industry standards like ISO 27001 and SOC 2.
faq.5.question: What happens after a project is delivered?
faq.5.answer: We offer ongoing maintenance and support plans. This includes bug fixes, performance monitoring, security updates, and feature enhancements. We believe in long-term partnerships, not one-off projects.
faq.6.question: How do I get started?
faq.6.answer: Simply reach out through our contact form or any of our communication channels. We'll schedule a free discovery call to understand your needs and propose a tailored approach.
about.title: About Quartz
about.hero.title: Our Story
about.hero.description: Founded in Riyadh, Quartz was born from a vision to bridge the gap between business challenges and technology solutions. We combine deep technical expertise with genuine understanding of our clients' industries to deliver digital transformation that makes a measurable difference.
about.mission.title: Our Mission
about.mission.description: To empower businesses across the Middle East and beyond with world-class software, automation, quality assurance, and security solutions -- delivered with integrity, transparency, and a commitment to excellence.
